name: libapt-pkg-perl
title: libapt-pkg-perl
description:
Perl interface to libapt-pkg
A Perl interface to APT's libapt-pkg which provides modules for configuration
file/command line parsing, version comparison, inspection of the binary
package cache and source package details.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libapt-pkg-perl because Perl interface to libapt-pkg.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libapt-pkg-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libapt-pkg-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libapt-pkg-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
